title: taraxacum megalocarpum
intro: Taraxacum megalocarpum, commonly known as the large-seeded dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum megalocarpum include its use as a diuretic, its anti-inflammatory properties, and its potential to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and capsules, often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
